mapper.sql: INNER JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.order_uuid) FROM biz_finish_roll f
WHERE

SELECT o.uuid AS orderUuid, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_date AS orderDate, COUNT(*) AS totalRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0)), 0) AS totalWeight, SUM(CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS availableRollCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lockedRollCount FROM biz_finish_roll f
WHERE GROUP BY o.uuid, o.order_no, o.order_date ORDER BY CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, o.order_date ASC, o.order_no ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT o.customer_uuid AS customerUuid, o.customer_name AS customerName, f.uuid AS finishUuid, f.finish_roll_no AS finishRollNo, o.uuid AS orderUuid, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_date AS orderDate, f.warehouse_uuid AS warehouseUuid, w.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, w.location AS warehouseLocation, f.paper_name AS paperName, f.gram_weight AS gramWeight, f.finish_width AS finishWidth, f.finish_diameter AS finishDiameter, f.finish_core_diameter AS finishCoreDiameter, f.actual_weight AS actualWeight, COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, 0) AS remainingWeight, f.stock_in_time AS stockInTime, CASE WHEN f.stock_in_time IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, f.stock_in_time, NOW()) END AS stockAgeDays, f.is_remain AS isRemain, f.source_type AS sourceType, CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS stockState, dd.out_weight AS plannedOutWeight, d.uuid AS deliveryUuid, d.delivery_no AS deliveryNo FROM biz_finish_roll f
LEFT JOIN biz_delivery_order d ON d.uuid = dd.delivery_uuid AND d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_warehouse w ON w.uuid = f.warehouse_uuid AND w.is_deleted = 0 WHERE AND f.order_uuid IN
#{orderUuid}
ORDER BY o.order_date ASC, o.order_no ASC, CASE WHEN dd.uuid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ASC, f.finish_roll_no ASC
